nav_hint: Use the menu below. Numbers suggest the recommended flow.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Try refreshing the page.
train_warn: Run this command in your terminal:
disclaimer: Not investment advice. Historical & API data are indicative only.
select_currencies_empty: Select at least one currency to view the chart.

home.title: Economic Trend Forecasting
home.subtitle: FX trend analysis and direction forecasts — clear, visual, and data-driven.
home.about_text: This platform combines historical data, live API rates, and an LSTM model to help you understand FX moves and forecast up/down direction.
home.features: Features: Executive dashboard · Interactive charts · Forecast + confidence · Evaluation vs baseline · Realtime & heatmap · Compare 2 currencies · What-if simulation · PDF/CSV export · Prediction log
home.flow: Workflow: Dataset → Preprocessing → Visualization → LSTM Model → Forecast → Evaluation → Trend → Insight → Realtime

dataset.title: Dataset
dataset.subtitle: Preview of historical exchange-rate data used for training and analysis.
dataset.preview_note: Pick one or more currencies, drag the year range, then explore the chart and table.
dataset.multi_chart_note: Multiple currencies are shown as a base-100 index so different scales remain readable.
dataset.table_caption: Rows in the selected year range

preprocessing.title: Preprocessing
preprocessing.subtitle: Clean and transform raw data into a model-ready format.
preprocessing.note: Column converted to USD per 1 unit ({name}) to match live API quotes.

visualisasi.title: Visualization
visualisasi.subtitle: Interactive FX charts with a consistent visual style.

lstm.title: LSTM Model
lstm.subtitle: How the model works — explained in plain language.
lstm.explain: LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) is a neural network that learns from daily FX sequences to estimate the next move. It fits well when historical patterns still reflect current market conditions.

prediksi.title: FX Direction Forecast
prediksi.subtitle: Trained LSTM plus live API rate to estimate up/down direction.
prediksi.note: Model is saved on disk. UP if forecast > live rate; DOWN otherwise.
prediksi.no_api: Live rate unavailable. Check connection or API limits.

evaluasi.title: Model Evaluation
evaluasi.subtitle: LSTM vs Moving Average baseline and residual analysis.

trend.title: Trend Analysis
trend.subtitle: Direction summary from history, AI forecast, and live market.

insight.title: Insight
insight.subtitle: Automated summary and logged forecasts.
insight.no_api: API data unavailable for live insight.
insight.log_empty: No entries yet. Open Forecast with API active.

realtime.title: Live Rates
realtime.subtitle: All API live rates, trend heatmap, and 30-day sparklines when in dataset.
realtime.no_api: API unavailable. Check your internet connection.

bandingkan.title: Compare Currencies
bandingkan.subtitle: Two FX series normalized to index 100 for relative comparison.
bandingkan.note: Pick two different currencies. Starting index = 100.

simulasi.title: What-If Simulation
simulasi.subtitle: Hypothetical live rate scenarios and their effect on LSTM output.
simulasi.note: Adjust the slider to simulate a different live rate. Forecast recalculates.
